description: Pattern generation table (d100). Transcribed from generation-tables.ts PATTERN_TABLE. 'No Pattern' occupies alternating bands (50% total). The 'families' map supports substring matching used by sensitivity triggers (e.g. patternIncludes 'Ringed/Striped', 'Spotted', 'Black').
note: 'includes' is the set of substrings a pattern matches for trigger predicates. A trigger patternIncludes:'Ringed' matches both Ringed/Striped patterns; patternIncludes:'Black' matches Ringed/Striped Black and Spotted Black.
